text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our training session, I stick around at the
track to observe how the other students are
faring.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh, Trainer? What're you still hanging around
here for?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, who are you looking at? Hmph! And right
after we finished training too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Stop looking! You're my trainer, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh, fine! I'll run another lap just for you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Then you'll see that only I deserve your attention!
choice_data_list: All right, let's see what you've got.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's how it's gonna be, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay. I'll show you what true running looks like!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You better commit it to memory! The majestic
form of the great and mighty Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, Tokai Teio enthralls me with her
spectacular running.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Do you mean that in a good or bad way?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the answer's obvious. But let's hear it
anyway.
choice_data_list: In a good way, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Teio heads off looking very pleased with herself.
